title.tr: CPU Win11 Uyumsuz - Microsoft Resmi Sartlari
title.en: CPU Not Win11-Compatible - Microsoft Official Requirements

risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Learn 'Windows 11 requirements' (17 Eki 2025 guncel) belgesinden alinmistir. Microsoft desteklenmeyen CPU'larda Win11 yuklemeyi resmi olarak desteklemez. Bypass yapilabilir ama gelecek guncellemeler ve destek garanti degildir.
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Learn 'Windows 11 requirements' (updated 2025-10-17). Microsoft does not officially support Win11 install on unsupported CPUs. Bypass possible but future updates and support are not guaranteed.

body.tr: Processor: 1 GHz veya hizli, 2+ cekirdek, uyumlu 64-bit islemci/SoC. Memory: 4 GB+. Storage: 64 GB+. Graphics: DirectX 12 + WDDM 2.0. System firmware: UEFI, Secure Boot capable. TPM: 2.0. Display: 720p, 9 inch+, 8-bit color. Internet: guncelleme/Win11 Home setup icin gerekli.
body.en: Processor: 1 GHz or faster, 2+ cores, compatible 64-bit CPU/SoC. Memory: 4 GB+. Storage: 64 GB+. Graphics: DirectX 12 + WDDM 2.0. System firmware: UEFI, Secure Boot capable. TPM: 2.0. Display: 720p, 9 inch+, 8-bit color. Internet: required for updates/Win11 Home setup.

title.tr: Resmi CPU listesi Microsoft tarafindan tutulur
title.en: Official CPU list maintained by Microsoft

body.tr: Microsoft 'Windows Processor Requirements' sayfasi Intel/AMD/Qualcomm desteklenen modeller listesini tutar. CPU'nuz listede yoksa, Win11'in 'resmi destekli' kurulumu mumkun degildir.
body.en: Microsoft maintains the 'Windows Processor Requirements' page with supported Intel/AMD/Qualcomm models. If your CPU is not listed, an 'officially supported' Win11 install is not possible.

body.tr: 'To upgrade directly to Windows 11, eligible Windows 10 devices must meet both of the following criteria: Running Windows 10, version 2004 or later. Installed the September 14, 2021 security update or later.'
body.en: 'To upgrade directly to Windows 11, eligible Windows 10 devices must meet both of the following criteria: Running Windows 10, version 2004 or later. Installed the September 14, 2021 security update or later.'

body.tr: Rufus aracina 'Windows User Experience' dialog'unda 'Remove requirement for 4GB+ RAM, Secure Boot and TPM 2.0' kutusu vardir. Bu seçenek Microsoft tarafindan onaylanmadi - Microsoft 'gelecek guncellemeler garanti degil' uyarisini koruyor.
body.en: Rufus has a 'Windows User Experience' dialog with 'Remove requirement for 4GB+ RAM, Secure Boot and TPM 2.0' checkbox. This is NOT Microsoft-approved - Microsoft warns 'future updates not guaranteed'.
